contexts.context: ...of his burthen, and he galloped off, leaving <mark>whirlwinds</mark> of dust behind him.
..., spreading over the canvas the lurid hues of <mark>whirlwind</mark> and volcano. We turn trembling from the contemplation...
...the undulating ocean of sand swept by the rising <mark>whirlwind</mark>, present a scenery of gloomy grandeur strictly appropriate...
